name: FastPrototypePreset
description: Preset optimized for rapid data generation. Ideal for integration testing, CI/CD pipelines, or quick prototyping.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

name: HighFidelityPreset
description: Preset optimized for maximum data quality and fidelity. Uses CTGAN with a high number of epochs and optimized batch size, prioritizing quality over speed. Forces adversarial validation.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

parameters.name: auto_report
parameters.description: Whether to automatically generate a validation report after generation

name: ImbalancedGeneratorPreset
description: Preset designed to generate synthetic data with a specific imbalanced distribution. Useful for creating test datasets for drift detection or bias analysis. Uses 'resample' or generative methods with forced custom distributions on the target.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

parameters.name: target_col
parameters.description: Name of the target column to apply the imbalanced distribution to

parameters.name: imbalance_ratio
parameters.description: Ratio of the minority class (e.g. 0.1 means 10% minority, 90% majority)

name: TimeSeriesPreset
description: Preset optimized for generating sequential or time-series data.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

parameters.name: time_key
parameters.description: Name of the column containing the timestamp or date

parameters.name: sequence_key
parameters.description: Column used to group rows into individual sequences

parameters.name: method
parameters.description: Generation method: 'timegan' for complex patterns, 'timevae' for speed, 'fflows' for periodic/seasonal series

name: BalancedDataGeneratorPreset
description: Preset designed to balance an originally imbalanced dataset. Uses SMOTE (or ADASYN) to oversample minority classes to achieve a balanced distribution.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

parameters.name: target_col
parameters.description: Name of the target column whose class distribution will be balanced

name: ConceptDriftPreset
description: Simulates sudden concept drift by altering the relationship between features and target. Useful for testing model robustness to P(y|x) changes.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

parameters.name: target_col
parameters.description: Name of the target column where the drift is applied

name: DiffusionPreset
description: Uses Tabular Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (TabDDPM) for synthesis. Diffusion models often capture complex multi-modal distributions better than GANs.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

name: RareDiseasePreset
description: Simulates a clinical cohort with a rare disease condition. Forces a very low disease prevalence ratio (e.g., 1% or 5%).

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

parameters.name: disease_ratio
parameters.description: Ratio of the rare disease in the data

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

parameters.name: n_visits
parameters.description: Average number of visits per patient

name: SeasonalTimeSeriesPreset
description: Generates time-series data with injected seasonal (sinusoidal) patterns. Strategy: 1. Uses RealGenerator (TimeGAN/TimeVAE) to learn base temporal dynamics. 2. Uses ScenarioInjector to superimpose a strong sinusoidal drift on target columns.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

parameters.name: time_col
parameters.description: Column with the timestamp

parameters.name: seasonal_cols
parameters.description: List of columns to inject seasonality into

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: The period of the seasonality (e.g., 12 for monthly)

parameters.name: amplitude
parameters.description: The strength of the seasonal effect

name: CopulaPreset
description: Uses Gaussian Copula to model dependencies. Very fast and statistically robust baseline, though supports privacy less than GANs.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

name: DataQualityAuditPreset
description: Focused on high-integrity generation with comprehensive automated reporting. Uses TVAE (often better than CTGAN for structure) and enables full reporting.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

name: DriftScenarioPreset
description: Preset designed to generate data with specific injected drift characteristics. Used for stress-testing ML models and drift detection systems.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

parameters.name: drift_scenarios
parameters.description: List with dictionaries defining drift scenarios.

name: FastPreset
description: Preset designed to generate data as quickly as possible, sacrificing some quality. Uses LightGBM for speed, minimal reporting.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

name: GradualDriftPreset
description: Simulates gradual drift over time or index.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

parameters.name: drift_cols
parameters.description: List of columns to apply gradual drift to

parameters.name: slope
parameters.description: The rate of drift (e.g., 0.01 means a 1% change per time unit)

name: OmicsIntegrationPreset
description: Generates multi-omics data (Clinical + Gene Expression + Proteomics) with high correlation integrity between layers.

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate

parameters.name: n_genes
parameters.description: Number of gene expression features to generate

parameters.name: n_proteins
parameters.description: Number of proteomics features to generate

name: SingleCellQualityPreset
description: Preset designed to generate high-quality single-cell RNA-seq data

parameters.name: n_samples
parameters.description: Number of samples to generate
